selection_source.current_submission_defaults: Current participant q0/q1 answers canonicalized into selected_drug and selected_dose tokens

peer_context_source: All peer_plot_submission_cache rows where has_complete_scales = 1 and canonical pair = psilocybin + medium
self_profile_source: ASC factor scores from the current submission kept in memory and drawn as a purple line plus points
peer_overlay_source: score rows returned for all complete matching peers from peer_plot_scores_query.csv
excluded_rows: 6f9d0e2c-1234-4ad9-acde-8b9df7301f00 because the current submission is excluded from peer comparison
peer-e-2026-03-19 because its canonical pair is alcohol + high
rendered_layers: purple self line and self points
peer violin density positioned on each ASC axis
quartile box, whiskers, and median mark on each ASC axis
optional dashed peer median path across axes
count_note: 3 complete peer profiles used for this comparison

footer_links: Learn more about Circe Science: https://circe-science.com/
